channel.title: Summa · Funded research summer schools
channel.description: Funded research summer schools, winter schools, and training schools across many academic fields — environmental & earth science, computing & data science, social sciences, and humanities.
channel.copyright: Data CC BY 4.0 — reuse with attribution and a link back to https://lione12138.github.io/summer-school-radar/

item.title: Social Science Data Analysis — Essex Summer School
item.description: Dates: 5 sessions · 5–12 days each. Location: Colchester, UK. Deadline: latest session deadline 2026-07-17. scholarship · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: satellite, deep learning, data analysis, statistics

item.title: ELLIS Summer School at Unit Saarbrücken — ELLIS
item.description: Dates: 24 Aug – 28 Aug 2026 · 5 days. Location: Saarland University. Deadline: 2026-07-19. Fee about EUR 250 · Apply on official page. Topics: AI

item.title: 48th CERN School of Computing — CERN School of Computing
item.description: Dates: 23 Aug – 5 Sep 2026 · 14 days. Location: University of Liverpool, Liverpool, United Kingdom. Deadline: uncertain. financial support · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: software engineering, physics, particle physics, engineering

item.title: ICOS Summer/Winter School January 2027, application is now open — ICOS
item.description: Dates: 18 Jan – 28 Jan 2027 · 11 days. Location: Europe. Deadline: 2026-07-31. financial support · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: climate, climate change, remote sensing, statistics

item.title: SICSS-AMU/Law — Summer Institutes in Computational Social Science
item.description: Dates: 7 Sep – 18 Sep 2026 · 12 days. Location: Adam Mickiewicz University, Poznań. Deadline: uncertain. tuition waiver · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: data science, law, social science, social science methods

item.title: Applied Public Policy Evaluation — Tinbergen Institute
item.description: Dates: 24 Aug – 28 Aug 2026 · 5 days. Location: Housing Student Council. Deadline: uncertain. scholarship, financial support · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: climate, climate change, machine learning, deep learning

item.title: Economics of Climate Change — Tinbergen Institute
item.description: Dates: 24 Aug – 28 Aug 2026 · 5 days. Location: Housing Student Council. Deadline: uncertain. scholarship, financial support · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: climate, climate change, machine learning, deep learning

item.title: SICSS-Buenos Aires — Summer Institutes in Computational Social Science
item.description: Dates: 10 Aug – 21 Aug 2026 · 12 days. Location: National University of San Martín, Buenos Aires, Argentina. Deadline: uncertain. tuition waiver · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: data science, social science, social science methods

item.title: SICSS-ISSP — Summer Institutes in Computational Social Science
item.description: Dates: 10 Aug – 21 Aug 2026 · 12 days. Location: Ouagadougou, Burkina Faso. Deadline: uncertain. tuition waiver · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: data science, social science, social science methods

item.title: SICSS-Stanford — Summer Institutes in Computational Social Science
item.description: Dates: 10 Aug – 21 Aug 2026 · 12 days. Location: Stanford University. Deadline: uncertain. tuition waiver · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: data science, social science, social science methods

item.title: IEEE RAS Summer School in Germany: Bridging AI and Robotics — IEEE RAS Cognitive Robotics Summer School
item.description: Dates: 7 Sep – 11 Sep 2026 · 5 days. Location: Abtei Frauenwörth, Chiemsee, Germany. Deadline: uncertain. Fee about EUR 0 · Apply on official page. Topics: climate, AI, artificial intelligence, machine learning

item.title: SICSS-WITS-StAndrews — Summer Institutes in Computational Social Science
item.description: Dates: 17 Aug – 21 Aug 2026 · 5 days. Location: Johnannesburg, South Africa. Deadline: uncertain. tuition waiver · amount not stated · Apply on official page. Topics: data science, social science, social science methods
